Main Heading

This is a paragraph with some content for testing purposes. We need enough words to exceed the 300-word threshold for thin content detection. So here is some additional filler text that will help us reach that goal. The quick brown fox jumps over the lazy dog. Lorem ipsum dolor sit amet, consectetur adipiscing elit. Sed do eiusmod tempor incididunt ut labore et dolore magna aliqua. Ut enim ad minim veniam, quis nostrud exercitation ullamco laboris nisi ut aliquip ex ea commodo consequat. Duis aute irure dolor in reprehenderit in voluptate velit esse cillum dolore eu fugiat nulla pariatur. Excepteur sint occaecat cupidatat non proident, sunt in culpa qui officia deserunt mollit anim id est laborum. Curabitur pretium tincidunt lacus. Nulla gravida tortor nec sapien condimentum, nec sollicitudin sapien sodales. Proin vehicula magna et libero fringilla, nec ultricies nulla placerat. Donec facilisis magna vel turpis tincidunt, at pharetra sapien pellentesque. Integer nec odio praesent libero sed cursus ante dapibus diam. Nulla quis sem at nibh elementum imperdiet. Duis sagittis ipsum praesent mauris fusce nec tellus.

Subheading One

Another paragraph with more text content to ensure we have sufficient word count for analysis. This helps verify that the thin content detection works correctly. Vestibulum ante ipsum primis in faucibus orci luctus et ultrices posuere cubilia curae. Mauris viverra veniam sed lacus suscipit, nec scelerisque libero tempor. Pellentesque habitant morbi tristique senectus et netus et malesuada fames ac turpis egestas. Suspendisse potenti. Cras ultricies ligula sed magna dictum porta. Vivamus magna justo lacinia eget consectetur sed convallis at tellus. Praesent sapien massa convallis a pellentesque nec egestas nisi lorem. Nulla porttitor accumsan tincidunt mauris blandit aliquet elit ergo bibendum. Sed porttitor lectus nibh curabitur non nulla sit amet nisl tempus. Quisque velit nisi pretium ut lacinia in elementum id enim donec.

Subheading Two

Final paragraph with an external link to another site for testing cross-domain link detection and counting mechanisms. This ensures the analyzer properly distinguishes between internal navigation links and outbound references to other domains.
